    • Method Detail

      • doAlign

        public ij.ImagePlus doAlign(ij.ImagePlus image,
                            ij.gui.Roi[] Rois)
        Parameters:
        image - the imagestack to align
        Rois - the roi array containing the rois to align to, center of roi will be translated to center of the image
        Returns:
        the aligned image

      • doAlign

        public ij.ImagePlus doAlign(ij.ImagePlus image,
                            int[][] Rois)
        Parameters:
        image - image to align
        Rois - xy shift array
        Returns:
        the aligned image

      • doRotateAlign

        public ij.ImagePlus doRotateAlign(ij.ImagePlus image)
        Parameters:
        image - the image to rotate and align
        Returns:
        the rotated and aligned image

      • getDifference

        public double getDifference(ij.ImagePlus checkD,
                            ij.gui.Roi cRoi)
        Parameters:
        checkD - the image to check in
        cRoi - the ROI to check
        Returns:
        the difference between the basearray from rotateandalign and the rotated array
